hero.thesis: Generate $6,500 MRR by building 2–3 Webflow/Framer marketing sites per month at $2k–$5k each.
hero.marketSize: Over 30,000 businesses launch new websites monthly needing modern, responsive design.
hero.payingEvidence: High demand for no-code web design; agencies charge $10k+ per site.

ninetyDay.title: Set Up Your Foundation

actions.action: Set up your LLC using Stripe Atlas for legal protection and credibility.
Create a Webflow expert profile on platforms like Upwork and Fiverr.
actions.success: Profile is live and contains portfolio examples.

actions.action: Join Webflow and Framer Discord servers like 'Webflow Wizards' and 'Framer Fanatics'.
Draft a basic contract template using Lovable for client agreements.
Set up a Stripe account for client payments and invoicing.
actions.success: Stripe account active and ready to receive payments.

ninetyDay.metric: LLC, profiles, communities, contracts, and payment setup complete.

ninetyDay.title: Build Your Portfolio

actions.action: Design a personal portfolio site showcasing your best work on Webflow.
Create case studies for 3 past projects, focusing on outcomes and designs.
actions.success: Three case studies live on portfolio.

actions.action: Reach out to past clients for testimonials and permission to use their projects as references.

ninetyDay.metric: Live portfolio with case studies and testimonials.

actions.action: Identify 50 potential clients in sectors like SaaS, e-commerce, and personal brands via LinkedIn search.
Draft personalized outreach emails using your portfolio and case studies.
Send 20 emails to potential clients.
actions.success: Initial batch of outreach emails sent.

actions.action: Follow up on emails with LinkedIn connections requests.
actions.success: Sent 20 connection requests with personalized notes.

ninetyDay.title: Close Deals and Deliver

actions.action: Conduct discovery calls with interested clients to finalize needs and expectations.
Send official proposals and contracts to 3 clients using Lovable.
Begin work on the first contracted website project.
actions.success: Project started and deliverable timeline set.

ninetyDay.metric: Signed 3 clients and started project work.

ninetyDay.title: Expand Your Reach

actions.action: Join Facebook groups like 'Webflow Designers' and 'Framer Enthusiasts' to network.
Create a detailed client onboarding checklist in Notion for consistent project starts.
Contribute to discussions in online communities to build reputation.

ninetyDay.metric: Increased online presence and engaged with 10+ community members.

ninetyDay.title: Refine Process and Scale

actions.action: Optimize your workflow by creating templates for common tasks in Webflow and Framer.
actions.success: Templates created for faster project turnaround.

actions.action: Automate client communications using ConvertKit.
Review project timelines and adjust for efficiency.

ninetyDay.metric: Decreased time spent on repetitive tasks by 30%.

actions.action: Run a targeted LinkedIn ad campaign to attract more clients.
actions.success: Campaign live and driving traffic to portfolio.

actions.action: Write a guest post for a design blog like 'Design Daily'.
actions.success: Post submitted and scheduled for publication.

actions.action: Reach out to podcasts in the design space for guest appearances.
Conduct mid-project check-ins with all current clients.
Collect feedback via a structured survey post-delivery.
Implement feedback into current projects and processes.
actions.success: Processes adjusted based on client feedback.

actions.action: Analyze project costs and profitability using Notion.
actions.success: Detailed breakdown of profit margins completed.

actions.action: Adjust pricing tiers based on financial analysis and market demand.
actions.success: New pricing tiers set and communicated to clients.

actions.action: Update all client-facing materials with new pricing information.
Attend a virtual design conference or webinar.
Identify potential collaborators or subcontractors for scaling projects.
Reach out to collaborators for potential partnerships.

ninetyDay.title: Evaluate and Pivot

actions.action: Review project outcomes and client feedback from past 3 months.
Identify areas for improvement and set new goals for next quarter.
actions.success: Goals set and documented in Notion.

actions.action: Implement necessary changes to service offerings or client interactions.

ninetyDay.metric: Achieved 90% of original goals and set new targets.

ninetyDay.title: Prepare for Growth

actions.action: Document all processes to prepare for hiring support staff.
Identify key roles needed for growth and draft job descriptions.
Plan a launch for a premium service offering based on client feedback.

ninetyDay.metric: Ready to hire and launch new services.

toolStack.name: Webflow
toolStack.why: Primary tool for building client websites; fast, no-code, responsive.

toolStack.name: Framer
toolStack.why: For more interactive and advanced animations on sites.

toolStack.name: Stripe Atlas
toolStack.why: Simple LLC formation and banking setup.

toolStack.name: Lovable
toolStack.why: Draft and manage client contracts easily.
toolStack.pricing: Free for basic use, $20/month for advanced features.

toolStack.name: Notion
toolStack.why: Organize projects, manage tasks, and track financials.
toolStack.pricing: Free for personal use, $8/month for team plans.

toolStack.name: ConvertKit
toolStack.why: Automate email marketing and client communications.
toolStack.pricing: Free for up to 1,000 subscribers, $29/month for more.

firstTenCustomers.script:
Subject: Elevate Your Brand with a Stunning Website

Hi [Name],

I'm [Your Name], a specialist in crafting responsive and engaging websites using Webflow and Framer. I've helped brands like [Niche Example] achieve [Result].

Would you be open to a quick call to discuss how we can enhance your online presence?

Best,
[Your Name]
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Initial email, follow-up in 3 days, final attempt in 7 days.

pricing.starter: $2,000 per site for basic marketing pages.
pricing.growth: $3,500 per site including custom interactions and animations.
pricing.premium: $5,000 per site with full branding package and CMS setup.
pricing.raisingRules: Review and raise prices every 6 months based on demand and capacity.

failureModes: Ignoring contract terms, resulting in scope creep.
Failing to automate processes, leading to inefficiencies.
Not networking, resulting in limited client base.
Ignoring financials, leading to negative cash flow.
Failing to diversify client acquisition channels.

setup.llc: Use Stripe Atlas for LLC formation; includes legal and financial setup.
setup.payments: Setup Stripe for easy invoicing and payments from clients.
setup.contracts: Use Lovable to draft and manage client contracts efficiently.
setup.insurance: Consider professional liability insurance to protect against client disputes.

scaling: Once you've hit your $6,500 MRR target, consider scaling by hiring a junior developer or designer to handle overflow work. Document your processes in Notion to make onboarding simple. Use ConvertKit to maintain client communication consistency as you grow. Consider offering premium services or workshops to existing clients, expanding your revenue streams while leveraging your expertise. Network actively in design communities to find potential partners or subcontractors, allowing you to take on larger, more lucrative projects.
